description: flex-wrap: wrap (items break onto flex lines), grid line-based placement (grid-column: 1 / -1 and 2 / 4) with minmax() tracks, and text-align: justify (inter-word spaces stretch on every line but the paragraph's last).
visual_assertions: Six 150pt cards wrap into two flex lines of three, separated by the gap.
The grid header spans all three tracks (1 / -1); the wide cell spans tracks 2-3.
The minmax(120pt, 1fr) track is at least 120pt wide; the 2fr track is twice the 1fr share.
The justified paragraph's lines end flush at the right margin except the last.
